description: FIXED (flipped with the egress-renormalization fix, per the R12 rule; originally pinned the unnumbered-footer presentation). Provenance: live CLI session 2026-06-11, plan 2026-06-11-001. Construction: document_chunks loads 2 chunks; the pre-fetch (P-201 exact-id resolution) registers them as [1]..[2]. The single scripted completion's prose contains NO bracketed index at all, but its block cites [2]. The citation resolves; with the fix, block-only citations (no inline marker in the prose) are appended AFTER any inline-numbered ones, in parsed order -- here it is the only citation, so it takes number 1 and the footer renders the single [1] source:page entry. The prose itself is untouched (no markers to renumber or strip), so it still carries no bracketed digits.

document_chunks.content: Motor maintenance: megger test windings annually.
Grease the motor bearings every three months with lithium-based NLGI 2 grease.

turns.content:
Grease the motor bearings every three months using a lithium-based NLGI 2 grease, and wipe the fittings clean before applying the grease gun.

<citations>
[2]
</citations>

user_text_contains: Grease the motor bearings every three months
